prompts.name: No Bad Hands
prompts.text: Avoid malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, broken wrists, and unreadable gestures.

prompts.name: No Bad Face
prompts.text: Avoid warped facial features, asymmetrical eyes, broken mouth shapes, distorted nose, and unnatural expression.

prompts.name: No Extra Limbs
prompts.text: Avoid extra arms, extra legs, duplicate hands, repeated feet, ghost limbs, and accidental body fragments.

prompts.name: No Duplicate Subject
prompts.text: Avoid duplicate characters, cloned faces, unwanted copies, ghost subjects, and repeated silhouettes.

prompts.name: No Text
prompts.text: Avoid visible text, captions, logos, usernames, signatures, watermarks, and random letters.

prompts.name: No Artifacts
prompts.text: Avoid jpeg artifacts, compression noise, blocky texture, render glitches, broken edges, and corrupted details.

prompts.name: No Muddy Lighting
prompts.text: Avoid muddy shadows, underexposed faces, unclear background, blown highlights, and inconsistent light direction.

prompts.name: No Clutter
prompts.text: Avoid excessive clutter, random props, repeated objects, busy background noise, and details that distract from the subject.

prompts.name: No Style Drift
prompts.text: Avoid mixed rendering styles, inconsistent realism levels, mismatched face style, and clashing visual language.

prompts.name: No Poor Perspective
prompts.text: Avoid warped rooms, broken furniture perspective, floating objects, inconsistent scale, and impossible geometry.

prompts.name: No Bad Materials
prompts.text: Avoid plastic-looking skin, muddy fabric, incorrect metal reflections, broken glass, and unrealistic material response.

prompts.name: No Overprocessed Look
prompts.text: Avoid excessive sharpening, oversaturation, heavy filters, crushed blacks, and artificial HDR halos.

prompts.name: No Unwanted NSFW
prompts.text: Avoid unintended nudity, sexualized framing, explicit poses, or revealing clothing unless the user specifically requests it.

prompts.name: No Low Resolution
prompts.text: Avoid low-resolution appearance, blurry subject, missing detail, soft face, and weak texture quality.

prompts.name: No Bad Crop
prompts.text: Avoid cutting off important parts of the subject, accidental missing head, missing hands, missing feet, or awkward framing.
